title: eriogonum pyrolifolium
intro: Eriogonum pyrolifolium, also known as Redstem Buckwheat, is a perennial shrub plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum pyrolifolium include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Eriogonum pyrolifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies.
